metadata.title: Liftrix Backend-Frontend Integration Fixes
metadata.description: Critical fixes required to complete backend-frontend integration for Liftrix Android app

fixes.name: Fix Compilation Errors
fixes.description: Resolve compilation errors preventing app build - missing NotFoundError branches and unresolved Success/Error references
fixes.impact: Blocking - App cannot build, preventing all testing and functionality

issues: Missing NotFoundError branch in when expressions
Unresolved references to Success and Error in AnalyticsEngine
Type mismatches in anomaly detection use cases
technical_details.solution: Add exhaustive when branches and fix import statements for Result types

acceptance_criteria: App builds without compilation errors
All when expressions are exhaustive
Success/Error references properly resolved

fixes.name: Implement TrendIndicator Component
fixes.description: Create missing TrendIndicator composable component that is referenced by calorie tracking cards
fixes.impact: Blocking - Calorie tracking UI components cannot function without this component

requirements: Composable function showing up/down/stable trend arrows
Percentage change display with proper formatting

acceptance_criteria: TrendIndicator component displays trend arrows correctly
Color coding follows Material 3 design system
Accessibility descriptions provided
Calorie cards render without errors

fixes.name: Connect Widget System to Dashboard
fixes.description: Integrate WidgetContainer into ProgressDashboardScreen to make widget customization system accessible to users
fixes.impact: Critical - Widget customization features are completely inaccessible without this integration

technical_details.target_state: ProgressDashboardScreen uses WidgetContainer with configurable widgets
integration_steps: Connect ViewModel widget data to WidgetContainer

acceptance_criteria: ProgressDashboardScreen displays widgets via WidgetContainer
Widget configuration affects displayed widgets
Loading states work properly for all widgets
Dashboard layout adapts to different widget configurations

fixes.name: Add MET Data Seeding to Migration
fixes.description: Populate MET data table with research-backed calorie calculation values during database migration
fixes.impact: High - CalorieCalculator falls back to default values instead of research-backed data

technical_details.current_state: MET data table exists but is empty
technical_details.target_state: MET data table populated with 40+ exercise MET values
technical_details.data_source: MetDataSeed.kt contains ACSM and Compendium of Physical Activities values
technical_details.migration_strategy: Add data insertion statements to Migration27To28

acceptance_criteria: Migration populates MET data table with research values
CalorieCalculator accesses database MET values instead of fallbacks
Migration executes without errors on existing databases
MET data covers all major exercise categories

fixes.name: Connect Calorie Cards to Dashboard
fixes.description: Integrate calorie tracking cards into dashboard UI and connect to ProgressDashboardViewModel state
fixes.impact: High - Calorie progress tracking is not visible to users despite backend implementation

integration_steps: Connect loadCalorieSummary() method to UI state
Add CaloriesBurnedCard, DailyCaloriesCard to dashboard layout
Implement loading states for calorie widgets

acceptance_criteria: Calorie cards visible on dashboard screen
Cards display real user calorie data
Loading states work properly
Cards update when calorie data changes

fixes.name: Add Widget Settings Persistence
fixes.description: Implement DataStore persistence for user widget customization preferences
fixes.impact: High - User widget customizations don't persist across app sessions

implementation_approach: Create WidgetPreferences data class with user widget selections
Add DataStore serialization for widget configuration
Add widget preference loading to ProgressDashboardViewModel
persistence_requirements: Enabled/disabled state for each widget type

acceptance_criteria: Widget configurations persist across app restarts
Settings sync with existing settings system
Widget preferences load automatically on dashboard init
Changes to widget configuration save immediately

fixes.name: Create Widget Customization UI
fixes.description: Build user interface for toggling widgets on/off and configuring dashboard layout
fixes.impact: Medium - Users cannot access widget customization features without UI

ui_requirements: Widget toggle switches for each widget type
integration_approach: Add to Settings navigation or dashboard customization button
Connect to AnalyticsWidgetManager for configuration logic

acceptance_criteria: Users can toggle individual widgets on/off
Configuration level changes update widget selection
Changes reflect immediately in dashboard
UI follows Material 3 design guidelines

fixes.name: Verify Firebase Sync Functionality
fixes.description: Comprehensive testing and verification of Firebase sync workers and offline functionality
fixes.impact: Medium - Unknown reliability of offline/sync functionality affects user experience
acceptance_criteria: Sync workers execute successfully in background
Conflict resolution preserves most recent data
Offline operations queue properly for sync
Performance meets <5 second sync target

fixes.name: Add Real-time Widget Data Updates
fixes.description: Connect widget system to real workout data sources for live progress updates
fixes.impact: Medium - Widgets display sample data instead of user's actual progress

data_integration: Add error handling for missing data

acceptance_criteria: Widgets display real user progress data
Updates trigger within 2 seconds of workout completion
Missing data shows appropriate empty states
Widget data refreshes with dashboard refresh

fixes.name: Fix Chart Library Dependencies
fixes.description: Resolve Vico chart library import issues causing compilation problems
fixes.impact: Medium - Chart components cannot render, affecting analytics visualization

dependency_issues: Vico chart library imports not resolving
Chart components using placeholder TODO implementations
resolution_steps: Add missing Vico dependencies to build.gradle.kts
Replace TODO implementations with actual Vico charts

acceptance_criteria: Vico chart library imports resolve correctly
Chart components render without errors
Charts display with proper Material 3 theming
Chart animations work smoothly (60fps target)

fixes.name: Complete Type-Safe Navigation Migration
fixes.description: Finish migration from string-based navigation to type-safe LiftrixRoute system
fixes.impact: Medium - Mixed navigation patterns create maintenance complexity

migration_status: Some legacy string-based routes still in use
completion_steps: Migrate remaining string routes to LiftrixRoute
Update all navigation calls to use type-safe routes

acceptance_criteria: All navigation uses LiftrixRoute sealed classes
No string-based navigation routes remain
Deprecated navigation components removed
Navigation type safety enforced at compile time

fixes.name: Add Integration Tests for Analytics System
fixes.description: Create comprehensive integration tests for end-to-end analytics functionality
fixes.impact: Medium - Lack of integration tests makes system reliability unknown

test_coverage: Analytics calculation accuracy with known datasets
test_scenarios: New user onboarding and first workout

acceptance_criteria: 95%+ test coverage for analytics domain logic
Integration tests validate end-to-end workflows
Performance tests confirm <500ms calculation times
Error scenarios properly tested and handled

sprint_2_high_priority.goal: Complete calorie tracking and widget persistence

user_experience: Dashboard loads <2 seconds with all widgets
Real-time updates <2 seconds after workout completion
technical_quality: No runtime crashes in analytics system
Performance targets met across all devices
business_impact: 40% increase in user engagement with analytics features
Reduced user confusion about progress tracking
